name: rclone
description: The Swiss army knife of cloud storage

subcommands.name: about
subcommands.description: Get quota information from the remote

options.description: Full numbers instead of SI units
Format output as JSON

subcommands.name: authorize
subcommands.description: Remote authorization

options.description: Do not automatically open auth link in default browser

subcommands.name: backend
subcommands.description: Run a backend specific command

options.description: Format output as JSON

subcommands.name: cat
subcommands.description: Concatenates any files and sends them to stdout

options.description: Discard the output instead of printing
Only print N characters. (default -1)
Only print the first N characters
Start printing at offset N (or from end if -ve)
Only print the last N characters

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Checks the files in the source and destination match

options.description: Check by downloading rather than with hash
Make a combined report of changes to this file
Report all non-matching files to this file
Report all files with errors (hashing or reading) to this file
Report all matching files to this file
Report all files missing from the destination to this file
Report all files missing from the source to this file
Check one way only, source files must exist on remote

subcommands.name: cleanup
subcommands.description: Clean up the remote if possible

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Enter an interactive configuration session

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a new remote with name, type and options

subcommands.name: copy
subcommands.description: Copy files from source to dest, skipping already copied

subcommands.name: copyto
subcommands.description: Copy files from source to dest, skipping already copied

subcommands.name: copyurl
subcommands.description: Copy url content to dest

subcommands.name: cryptcheck
subcommands.description: Cryptcheck checks the integrity of a crypted remote

options.description: Make a combined report of changes to this file
Report all non-matching files to this file
Report all files with errors (hashing or reading) to this file
Report all matching files to this file
Report all files missing from the destination to this file
Report all files missing from the source to this file
Check one way only, source files must exist on remote

subcommands.name: cryptdecode
subcommands.description: Cryptdecode returns unencrypted file names

options.description: Reverse cryptdecode, encrypts filenames

subcommands.name: dedupe
subcommands.description: Interactively find duplicate filenames and delete/rename them

options.description: Find identical hashes rather than names
Dedupe mode

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Remove the files in path

options.description: Rmdirs removes empty directories but leaves root intact

subcommands.name: deletefile
subcommands.description: Remove a single file from remote

subcommands.name: genautocomplete
subcommands.description: Output completion script for a given shell

subcommands.name: bash
subcommands.description: Output bash completion script for rclone.

args.name: output_file
args.description: If output_file is "-", then the output will be written to stdout

subcommands.name: fish
subcommands.description: Output fish completion script for rclone.

args.name: output_file
args.description: If output_file is "-", then the output will be written to stdout

subcommands.name: zsh
subcommands.description: Output zsh completion script for rclone.

args.name: output_file
args.description: If output_file is "-", then the output will be written to stdout

subcommands.name: gendocs
subcommands.description: Output markdown docs for rclone to the directory supplied

subcommands.name: hashsum
subcommands.description: Produces a hashsum file for all the objects in the path

options.description: Output base64 encoded hashsum
Download the file and hash it locally; if this flag is not specified, the hash is requested from the remote
Output hashsums to a file rather than the terminal

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Show help for rclone commands, flags and backends

subcommands.name: flags
subcommands.description: List of global flags

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: Generate public link to file/folder

options.description: The amount of time that the link will be valid (default 100y)
Remove existing public link to file/folder

subcommands.name: listremotes
subcommands.description: List all the remotes in the config file

options.description: Show the type as well as names

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: List the objects in the path with size and path

subcommands.name: lsd
subcommands.description: List all directories/containers/buckets in the path

subcommands.name: lsf
subcommands.description: List directories and objects in remote:path formatted for parsing

options.description: Only list directories
Only list files
Recurse into the listing
Put a leading / in front of path names
Output in CSV format
Append a slash to directory names. (default true)
Output format - see  help for details (default "p")
Use this hash when h is used in the format (default "MD5")
Separator for the items in the format. (default ";")

subcommands.name: lsjson
subcommands.description: List directories and objects in the path in JSON format

options.description: Only list directories
Only list files
Recurse into the listing
Show the encrypted names
Include hashes in the output (may take longer)
Show only this hash type (may be repeated)
Don't read the mime type (can speed things up)
Don't read the modification time (can speed things up)
Show the ID of the underlying Object

subcommands.name: lsl
subcommands.description: List the objects in path with modification time, size and path

subcommands.name: md5sum
subcommands.description: Produces an md5sum file for all the objects in the path

options.description: Output base64 encoded hashsum
Download the file and hash it locally; if this flag is not specified, the hash is requested from the remote
Output hashsums to a file rather than the terminal

subcommands.name: mkdir
subcommands.description: Make the path if it doesn't already exist

subcommands.name: mount
subcommands.description: Mount the remote as file system on a mountpoint

subcommands.name: move
subcommands.description: Move files from source to dest

subcommands.name: moveto
subcommands.description: Move file or directory from source to dest

subcommands.name: ncdu
subcommands.description: Explore a remote with a text based user interface

subcommands.name: obscure
subcommands.description: Obscure password for use in the rclone config file

subcommands.name: purge
subcommands.description: Remove the path and all of its contents

subcommands.name: rc
subcommands.description: Run a command against a running rclone

subcommands.name: rcat
subcommands.description: Copies standard input to file on remote

subcommands.name: rcd
subcommands.description: Run rclone listening to remote control commands only

subcommands.name: rmdir
subcommands.description: Remove the empty directory at path

subcommands.name: rmdirs
subcommands.description: Remove empty directories under the path

subcommands.name: selfupdate
subcommands.description: Update the rclone binary

subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.description: Serve a remote over a protocol

subcommands.name: settier
subcommands.description: Changes storage class/tier of objects in remote

subcommands.name: sha1sum
subcommands.description: Produces an sha1sum file for all the objects in the path

subcommands.name: size
subcommands.description: Prints the total size and number of objects in remote:path

subcommands.name: sync
subcommands.description: Make source and dest identical, modifying destination only

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Run a test command

subcommands.name: touch
subcommands.description: Create new file or change file modification time

subcommands.name: tree
subcommands.description: List the contents of the remote in a tree like fashion

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Show the version number

options.description: View your current rclone version
Show help for rclone commands, flags and backends
